parameters.query: =UPDATE akama_jobs SET status = 'updating', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $('Find Job By Reply').item.json.id }}
=UPDATE akama_jobs SET status = 'pr_created', agent_output = '', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $('Find Job By Reply').item.json.id }}

parameters.text:
=[{{ $('Find Job By Reply').item.json.provider }}] Updated — {{ $('Find Job By Reply').item.json.pr_url }}

Reply for more or /done {{ $('Find Job By Reply').item.json.id }}

parameters.query: =UPDATE akama_jobs SET notification_msg_id = '{{ $json.message_id }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $('Find Job By Reply').item.json.id }}
=UPDATE akama_jobs SET status = 'failed', error_msg = '{{ $json.message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $('Find Job By Reply').item.json.id }}
